title: ferray-stats: no dtype= parameter on sum/prod — integer overflow risk
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.sum(int32_arr) automatically promotes to int64 to avoid overflow. np.sum(arr, dtype=np.float64) allows explicit output type control. ferray-stats sum/prod return the same type as input. Summing a large i32 array can silently overflow. At minimum, document the overflow behavior. Better: add a dtype-like mechanism or auto-promote integer sums to the next wider type.
